since_last: 82% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.59%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 82% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.67% · BTC +0.03% · Gold +1.08% · Nasdaq100 +1.52%. 82% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.59%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.59%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.74%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +9.75%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +9.75%, ANET +8.16%, AMD +8.12%, S +7.89%, INOD +7.77%. Laggards: AVAV -4.72%, HON -1.99%, INTU -1.98%, MSFT -1.53%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.07% at $162.12
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.07% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
